'''''Kala'din''''' was a [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] operated by [[Airam (group)|Airam]] clan leader [[Ilay]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] the ''Kala'din'' was employed by Ilay. She used the ship, along with [[R60 T-wing interceptor|T-wings]] of [[Cobalt Squadron (R60 T-wing interceptor)|Cobalt]] and [[Crimson Squadron (Airam)|Crimson Squadron]] and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] from [[Tiger Squadron (Airam)|Tiger Squadron]], to rendezvous with [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial-class Star Destroyer]] [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']] to perform negotiations following her unsuccessful [[Mission to Kuras Drift|raid]] at the [[The Drift/Legends|Kuras Drift]].

However, her rival clan leader and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] supporter [[Tamaron]] managed to locate her meeting and [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] sent [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] from [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]] from [[Green Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Green Squadron]] to [[Battle of Aiqin 4|disable]] her ship. Despite her fighter escorts and ''Rage{{'s}}'' own fighters, her ship was disabled and [[CR90 corvette/Legends|corvette]] [[Storm (CR90 corvette)|''Storm'']] arrived to board and capture her. Both Rebel squadrons then held of Imperial reinforcements including [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Advanced]] from [[Avenger Squadron]] long enough for ''Storm'' to complete their operation and escape to [[Hyperspace/Legends|Hyperspace]] the ship was likely destroyed afterwards.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
